description: Guarded mutating deployed testnet journey: submits a verifier-funded AlignmentAttestation, waits for inclusion, and asserts the deployed indexer event cache reflects it.

data.guardPolicy: Requires COMMONALITY_VERIFIER_ENABLE_TESTNET_SMOKE=1, COMMONALITY_VERIFIER_ENABLE_TESTNET_MUTATION=1, COMMONALITY_TESTNET_RPC_URL, and COMMONALITY_TESTNET_VERIFIER_PRIVATE_KEY before submitting a verifier-funded AlignmentAttestation on deployed testnet.
